7. **total_budget**: ✓ INCLUDED - Complete cost breakdown provided with flights (€120), accommodation (€360), restaurants (€75), activities (€115), and total (€670)

Note: The package also includes restaurants (€75) in the total budget, which addresses the user's request for "restaurants" planning, even though restaurants weren't explicitly listed as a separate format item.

All 7 items from the required format are present and fully specified with appropriate details.
